name: Icosavax Inc. Common Stock
summary: Icosavax, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company leveraging its virus-like particle (VLP) platform technology to develop differentiated, broadly protective vaccines against infectious diseases. The company's pipeline includes vaccine candidates targeting respiratory syncytial virus (RSV), human metapneumovirus (hMPV), and severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2). Icosavax is based in the United States.
